data.title: BTC breaks through 83,000 USDT, up 2.28% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 83,000 USDT and is now at 83,012 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 2.28%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: U.S. President Trump Praises Tariff Policy on Social Media
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has once again commented on tariff policy via Truth Social, stating, "Our tariff policy is doing very well. This is exciting for both the United States and the world!"

data.title: Binance Futures to Launch XCNUSDT Perpetual Contract With 25x  Leverage
data.description: Binance Futures has announced the launch of a new USDT-margined perpetual contract - XCNUSDT, offering up to 25x leverage. Trading will go live on April 11, 2025, at 15:30 (UTC).

data.title: YZi Labs transfers 1 million AXS, 3 million PERP and 1 million CHESS to Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember's monitoring, in the past half hour, YZi Labs transferred 1 million AXS (worth $2.39 million), 3 million PERP (worth $560,000) and 1 million CHESS (worth $50,000) to Binance. These tokens were obtained by YZi Labs through investment unlocking.

data.title: Federal Reserve Anticipates Prolonged Rate Stability Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Collins has indicated that the central bank expects to maintain interest rates at their current levels for an extended period. This decision is influenced by the impact of tariffs, which are projected to drive inflation significantly above 3% this year.

data.title: Rising U.S. and UK Bond Yields Linked to Hedge Fund Liquidity Needs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Elmar Volker, a senior fixed income analyst at LBBW, reported that the rise in U.S. and UK bond yields may be partly attributed to hedge funds' liquidity needs following a significant drop in stock prices earlier this week. Volker explained that the sharp decline in stock market prices forced hedge funds to sell off assets, providing an additional explanation for the weakness observed in the bond markets of the United States and the United Kingdom.

data.title: Binance to launch XCNUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the XCNUSDT perpetual contract at 15:30 (UTC) on April 11, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 25 times. The contract supports multi-asset mode, with a funding rate cap of ±2.00% and settlement every 4 hours. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Grayscale transferred about 651 BTC, worth $53.41 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, Grayscale transferred about 651 BTC to an unmarked address 4 minutes ago, worth 53.41 million US dollars.

data.title: Fed's Collins: Fed now expects to keep interest rates unchanged for longer
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Collins: It is currently expected that the Fed will need to keep interest rates unchanged for a longer period of time. Due to the impact of tariffs, inflation is expected to far exceed 3% this year. (Jinshi)

data.title: ETH/BTC Collapse Isn’t the End: Analyst Sees Silent Rebuild
data.description:
Ethereum's 77% collapse against Bitcoin hides a quiet technical renaissance that could fuel its long-term revival.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/eth-btc-collapse-isnt-the-end-analyst-sees-silent-rebuild/
